    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Enums.ActivationMethod
    MassSpectrum.activationMethod()
    MS2+ activation method; NONE for MS1 or when the activation method was not reported by the source.
    Enums.ActivationMethod
    SpectrumIndex.activationMethodAt(int i)
    (M74) Returns the activation method at spectrum i; NONE when the M74 column is absent or the stored value is 0.
    static Enums.ActivationMethod
    Enums.ActivationMethod.fromInt(int v)
    Resolve an integer on-disk value to an Enums.ActivationMethod constant.
    static Enums.ActivationMethod
    Enums.ActivationMethod.valueOf(String name)
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    static Enums.ActivationMethod[]
    Enums.ActivationMethod.values()
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

    static Enums.ActivationMethod
    CVTermMapper.activationMethodFor(String accession)
    (M74) Resolve a PSI-MS activation-method accession to the matching Enums.ActivationMethod constant, or null if the accession does not name a recognised activation method.

    Method
    Description
    static String[]
    CVTermMapper.activationAccessionFor(Enums.ActivationMethod method)
    (M74) Two-element ``[accession, name]`` pair for emitting an <activation> cvParam from an ActivationMethod, or null for NONE.
